criteria.name: AI-Powered Budgeting/Expense Tracking
criteria.description: Apps that utilize AI to automatically categorize transactions, track spending habits, and provide insights for better budget allocation.
criteria.sources: Forbes, AI IXX, DX Talks, Landmark National Bank, Digicrusader

criteria.name: Personalized Financial Advice/Recommendations
criteria.description: Apps that leverage AI to offer tailored advice, budgeting tips, and recommendations based on individual financial behaviors and goals.
criteria.sources: Forbes, DX Talks, Landmark National Bank, Digicrusader

criteria.name: AI-Driven Investment Management
criteria.description: Apps that use AI algorithms to automate investment strategies, provide portfolio management, and offer insights on market trends and investment opportunities.
criteria.sources: Forbes, RockFlow, WallStreetZen, Landmark National Bank, Magnifi, Incite AI

criteria.name: Bill Negotiation/Subscription Management
criteria.description: Apps that employ AI to identify potential savings by negotiating bills and managing subscriptions to reduce recurring expenses.

criteria.name: Goal Setting/Tracking
criteria.description: Apps that allow users to set financial goals (e.g., saving for emergencies, paying off debt) and provide visual progress indicators and AI-driven insights to stay motivated.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Chatbot Assistance
criteria.description: Apps that feature AI-powered chatbots to assist users with budgeting, expense tracking, and savings through conversational interfaces.
criteria.sources: AI IXX, Forbes, Landmark National Bank, Digicrusader

criteria.name: Comprehensive Financial Planning
criteria.description: Apps that combine budgeting, financial planning, and investment tracking into one platform, providing a detailed analysis of users' financial health.

criteria.name: AI for Credit Scoring/Loans
criteria.description: Apps using AI for credit scoring to provide loans and financial services

criteria.name: AI-Powered Financial Analytics
criteria.description: Apps using AI to provide financial analytics and data visualization

criteria.name: AI for Cybersecurity in Finance
criteria.description: Apps using AI for cybersecurity and fraud detection

criteria.name: AI for Automating Accounting Workflows
criteria.description: AI-powered platforms that streamline finance and accounting workflows with intelligent automation, such as financial reconciliations.

criteria.name: AI for Financial Planning and Analysis (FP&A)
criteria.description: Tools designed to help teams make sense of data for informed financial decisions, integrating with tools like Microsoft Excel and Power BI.

criteria.name: AI for Anomaly Detection
criteria.description: AI-powered anomaly detection that continuously monitors data to highlight risks, errors, or unexpected activity across forecasts, budgets, and performance reports.
